architectural_impact.summary: Plan is purely additive — creates a new CrystalField geometry system following the established GeometrySystem interface pattern. No modifications to modeManager, renderLoop, audio pipeline, or mapping systems required. The uniform interface is shared across all modes, so the new system plugs in seamlessly.

interface_compliance.GeometrySystem: COMPLIANT — CrystalField implements init/draw/cleanup/setOpacity identical to pointCloud.ts
interface_compliance.uniform_interface: COMPLIANT — all 23 uniforms match existing shader contract
interface_compliance.quality_profile: COMPLIANT — maxPoints scaled at 0.8x of maxPoints tier values (low:160, medium:400, high:960)
interface_compliance.mode_manager: COMPLIANT — registered as 4th mode in round-robin rotation, no modeManager changes needed

dependency_analysis.US-026: SATISFIED — GeometrySystem interface and modeManager exist
dependency_analysis.US-041: SATISFIED — volumetricPoints generator framework exists with shape registration
dependency_analysis.downstream_impact: US-048 shader validation automatically covers new shaders via initAllForValidation()

second_mode_is_volumetric_and_point_base.evidence: CrystalField uses THREE.Points + BufferGeometry with 3D lattice positions (crystalCluster/geode shapes) rendered through perspective camera

mode_uses_3d_deformation.evidence: crystalWarp.vert.glsl applies quantized FBM noise, bass-driven radial expansion, two-axis twist, treble micro-jitter — all in 3D world space

no_2d_line_or_flat_plane_geometries_rema.evidence: Grep confirms zero PlaneGeometry/PlaneBufferGeometry/LineSegments/WaveField references. Only Canvas2D mention is a comment in scene.ts confirming it's not used.

mode_switching_preserves_audio_pipeline.evidence: CrystalField registered in modeManager which handles transitions; renderLoop audio analysis is mode-agnostic — bassEnergy/trebleEnergy flow through FrameState regardless of active mode

risks.risk: Shader compile errors on specific GPU drivers
risks.mitigation: US-048 initAllForValidation() precompiles all shaders at startup; quantized noise in crystalWarp uses standard GLSL operations

risks.risk: 4-mode rotation increases startup shader compilation time
risks.mitigation: cleanupInactive() disposes non-active modes after validation; runtime cost unchanged

risks.risk: Bundle size increase from additional shaders
risks.mitigation: Two new shader files add ~160 lines of GLSL; bundle already 567KB, impact is <1KB gzipped

notes: WaveField.ts does not exist in the codebase — no deletion needed as noted in the plan
Plan correctly identified this as purely additive work
CrystalField already implemented and integrated in current branch
Build passes cleanly with zero TypeScript errors
Quality scaling uses 0.8x multiplier on maxPoints rather than a separate maxCrystalPoints field — simpler than the plan proposed but functionally equivalent
